Articles

PTI Methodology

PTI Methodology

What the Project Targeting Index (PTI) is, how the data pipeline works, and how the composite index is constructed.

PTI overview paper
Past Projects

A catalogue of PTI dashboards built for World Bank projects across regions. Each entry links to the live application and the GitHub repositories used to prepare data and launch the app.

Build a PTI

Build a PTI

Overview of the seven-step pipeline that takes raw country data through to a deployed Project Targeting Index (PTI) Shiny dashboard with devPTIpack.

Step 0 — Setup new project
Step 1 — Shapefiles
Step 2 — Zonal stats (optional)
Step 3 — Metadata Excel
Step 4 — HEX data
Step 5 — Compile & finalise
Step 6 — Deploy
Data preparation reference

Canonical column-by-column reference for the two data inputs that feed every PTI app — administrative-boundary shapes (admin_bounds.rds) and the metadata Excel template (mtdt.xlsx).

On this page

Developed by Eduard Bukin, Koichi Ito.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
